title: Speedscale BYOC OTel Collector → S3 chart values

bucket.description: S3 bucket name (required) — must exist before installing

region.description: AWS region where the bucket lives (e.g. us-east-1)

endpoint.description: Custom S3 endpoint for non-AWS providers (e.g. https://nyc3.digitaloceanspaces.com). Leave empty for AWS S3.

forcePathStyle.description: Force path-style URLs (bucket in path, not subdomain). Required for most S3-compatible providers.

credentialsSecret.description: K8s Secret name with accessKeyId + secretAccessKey. Set to empty string for IRSA.

enabled.description: Enable IRSA (EKS only). When true, roleArn is required.

roleArn.description: IAM role ARN for IRSA (e.g. arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/my-role)

serviceAccountName.description: Name of the ServiceAccount created when IRSA is enabled
